issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect prevents resting, not causes resting. Should use a keyword-granting action or a custom restriction mechanism. The card prevents a character from being rested.

Missing duration constraint. Text states 'cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' — this requires duration:'UntilEndOfOpponentNextTurn' or similar, indicating a temporary effect that lasts through opponent's turn.
Effect logic is inverted. Should prevent the target character from being rested (a restriction/immunity), not rest it. Current DSL applies Rest action, which is the opposite of the intended effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.
